title: Product Intelligence Record
description: An open, authenticated record of product facts. GTIN is the primary key. Facts are contributed by retailers or certified by the brand via domain ownership verification.

gtin.description: GTIN-8, UPC-12, EAN-13, or GTIN-14. Primary key. Filename must match: {gtin}.json

range.description: Product line or range name, if applicable

name.description: Clean product name, without marketing language

category.description: Lowercase, underscore-separated. e.g. bar_fridge, wine_fridge, chest_freezer

brand_certified.description: True only when the brand has verified ownership of brand_domain and approved these facts

brand_domain.description: Domain used to verify brand ownership via DNS TXT record

submitted_by.description: Domain of the entity that initially submitted this record

facts.description: Flat key-value product facts. Conventions: (1) encode units in the key — capacity_litres, weight_kg, noise_db, dimensions_exterior_w_mm. (2) classification codes are strings — ip_rating: 'IP24', not 24. (3) market-specific ratings include market suffix — energy_star_rating_au: 8. (4) currency-denominated values include currency in key — running_cost_aud_annual. (5) append _note to a key for prose qualifications that cannot be expressed as a typed value — power_consumption_note. (6) component suppliers use component_ prefix — component_compressor, component_fan_primary. Values are string, number, boolean, or array of strings.

qa.description: Pre-answered questions for AI agents. Each answer is derived from and cites specific fact keys.

q.description: Natural language question as a consumer or AI agent would ask it

a.description: Complete, direct answer. Include relevant context. Do not hedge unless genuinely uncertain.

facts.description: Fact keys this answer is derived from. Makes each answer auditable.

documents.description: References to official product documents. URLs only — content is not embedded.

brand_certified.description: True when the brand has confirmed this is the official current document

sellers.description: Known sellers of this product. authorized:true requires explicit brand confirmation.

authorized.description: True when brand has explicitly authorized this seller. Omit or false if unconfirmed.

regions.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes where this seller operates

price.description: Current price in currency specified by currency field. Omit if price changes frequently — link to url instead.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. e.g. AUD, USD, GBP

in_stock.description: Current stock status. Omit if not maintained in real-time.
